core_mechanism: symmetry reduction by quotienting a symmetric space under the action of a finite cyclic group (orbifold projection): a large symmetry group is broken to a residual subgroup by retaining only modes invariant under the discrete action, with extra localized modes arising in the twisted sectors at the action's fixed points
brief_reason: The abstract builds the model as a Z_6 orbifold compactification that reduces the large E_8xE_8 symmetry to a smaller residual gauge group with a specific surviving spectrum, which is exactly a finite-cyclic-group quotient keeping invariant modes plus fixed-point (twisted) sectors.
